task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the OrientDB Studio web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window open with the address bar showing 'localhost:2480/studio/index.html' or the OrientDB Studio login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent connected to the 'demodb' database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio interface showing 'demodb' as the active connected database in the header or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the 'Countries' class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Countries' class is selected in the Schema tab, or a query targeting the 'Countries' class (e.g., SELECT FROM Countries) is visible in the Browse tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the new record details for Portugal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new document form or an SQL INSERT query editor showing the fields Name='Portugal' and Type='European'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new record was successfully inserted into the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification in the UI, the executed query result showing the inserted record, or the 'Countries' data table displaying the new row with Name='Portugal' and Type='European'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within a web browser showing the OrientDB Studio UI, not via curl or OrientDB console commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible interaction with the browser UI (clicking tabs, typing in query boxes or forms) rather than editing a text file or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a background script to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The insertion process (filling out the document form or typing the INSERT query) is visibly performed within the OrientDB Studio browser window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires UI automation within OrientDB Studio. The 'demodb' database contains a pre-seeded 'Countries' class with real countries (e.g., Italy, Germany, France). The VLM should look for the explicit addition of 'Portugal' with Type 'European' via the OrientDB Studio web interface.
